```{r Stage_3_2_Clustering_and_truncation,echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='asis'}
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE, color = "White", background = "#1976d2") |> 
  footnote(general_title = "<div style='text-align: justify; color: black;'>Footnote</div>",
           general = footnote.table.15, escape = FALSE)

print(Table.15) 
    
} else {

##### 3.2.22.2. Step 2: Reference interval considering multiple clusters, ######
#####  with one isolated #######################################################


###### 3.2.22.2.1. Scenario 1


identify_main_cluster_and_RI <- function(num_clusters,
                                         midpoints, 
                                         sds, 
                                         proportions, 
                                         global_midpoint, 
                                         needs_log_transform = FALSE, 
                                         lambda = NULL) {
  
  if (num_clusters <= 1) {
    return(list(Cluster_Number = NA,
                Lower_Reference_Limit = NA,
                Upper_Reference_Limit = NA))}
  
  if (sum(proportions) != 100) {
    proportions <- proportions / sum(proportions) * 100
  }
  
  main_clusters <- which(proportions > 50)
  
  if (length(main_clusters) == 0) {
    return(list(Cluster_Number = NA,
                Lower_Reference_Limit = NA,
                Upper_Reference_Limit = NA))
  }
  
  distances <- abs(midpoints[main_clusters] - global_midpoint)
  
  min_distance_cluster <- main_clusters[which.min(distances)]
  
  for (i in 1:num_clusters) {
    if (i != min_distance_cluster) {
      distance_from_main <- abs(midpoints[i] - midpoints[min_distance_cluster])
      if (distance_from_main <= 1.96 * sds[min_distance_cluster]) {
        return(list(Cluster_Number = NA,
                Lower_Reference_Limit = NA,
                Upper_Reference_Limit = NA))
      }
    }
  }
  
  lower_limit <- midpoints[min_distance_cluster] - 1.96 * sds[min_distance_cluster]
  upper_limit <- midpoints[min_distance_cluster] + 1.96 * sds[min_distance_cluster]
  
  if (needs_log_transform && !is.null(lambda.LabRI)) {
    lower_limit <- InvBoxCox(lower_limit, lambda.LabRI)
    upper_limit <- InvBoxCox(upper_limit, lambda.LabRI)
  }
  
  return(list(
    Cluster_Number = min_distance_cluster,
    Mean = midpoints[min_distance_cluster],
    DP = sds[min_distance_cluster],
    Lower_Reference_Limit = lower_limit,
    Upper_Reference_Limit = upper_limit))
}


vector.clusters <- function(k.new,vetor.Mi,vetor.Sigma,vetor.Weights) {
  if (k.new < 1 || k.new > 7) {
    stop("k.new must be a value between 1 and 7")
  }
  vetor.Mi <- c(vetor.Mi[1:k.new], rep(NA, 7 - k.new))
  vetor.Sigma <- c(vetor.Sigma[1:k.new], rep(NA, 7 - k.new))
  vetor.Weights <- c(vetor.Weights[1:k.new], rep(NA, 7 - k.new))
  return(list(Mi = vetor.Mi, Sigma = vetor.Sigma, Weights = vetor.Weights))
}


results.vector.clusters <- vector.clusters(k.new = k.new,
                                           vetor.Mi = c(Mi.1,Mi.2,Mi.3,
                                                        Mi.4,Mi.5,Mi.6,Mi.7),
                                           vetor.Sigma = c(Sigma.1,Sigma.2,
                                                           Sigma.3,Sigma.4,
                                                           Sigma.5,Sigma.6,
                                                           Sigma.7),
                                           vetor.Weights = c(Weights.1,Weights.2,
                                                             Weights.3,Weights.4,
                                                             Weights.5,Weights.6,
                                                             Weights.7))


remover_NAs.1 <- function(vetor) {
  return(vetor[!is.na(vetor)])
}

vector.Mi <- remover_NAs.1(results.vector.clusters$Mi)
vector.Sigma <- remover_NAs.1(results.vector.clusters$Sigma)
vector.Weights <- remover_NAs.1(results.vector.clusters$Weights)


isolated.cluster <- identify_main_cluster_and_RI(num_clusters = k.new,
                                                 midpoints = vector.Mi,
                                                 sds = vector.Sigma,
                                                 proportions = vector.Weights,
                                                 global_midpoint = Q.midpoint,
                                                 needs_log_transform = needs_log_transform,
                                                 lambda = lambda.LabRI)

LRL.isolated.cluster <- isolated.cluster$Lower_Reference_Limit
URL.isolated.cluster <- isolated.cluster$Upper_Reference_Limit


###### 3.2.22.2.2. Scenario 2


percentage_outside_RI <- function(dataset, upper_limit,lower_limit) {
  n_acima <- sum(dataset > upper_limit)
  n_abaixo <- sum(dataset < lower_limit)
  percentual_acima <- round(n_acima / length(dataset),3)
  percentual_abaixo <- round(n_abaixo / length(dataset),3)
  resultado <- list(percentual_acima = percentual_acima, 
                    percentual_abaixo = percentual_abaixo)
  return(resultado)
}


outside.reflimR.2 <- percentage_outside_RI(dataset=dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado,
                                           upper_limit = URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                           lower_limit = LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2)

outside.refineR.2 <- percentage_outside_RI(dataset=dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado,
                                           upper_limit = URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
                                           lower_limit = LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2)

outside.refineR.2 <- c(outside.refineR.2$percentual_abaixo,
                       outside.refineR.2$percentual_acima)

outside.reflimR.2 <- c(outside.reflimR.2$percentual_abaixo,
                       outside.reflimR.2$percentual_acima)


check_all_values <- function(outside1, outside2) {
  all_values <- c(outside1, outside2)
  if (any(all_values > 0.06)) {
    return(list(URL = NA, LRL = NA))
  } else {
    return(list(URL = round(quantile(dataset.truncado$dataset.truncado,
                                     ifelse(isTRUE(lado=="Right_sided"),
                                            0.95,0.975)),digits=5), 
                LRL = round(quantile(dataset.truncado$dataset.truncado,
                                     ifelse(isTRUE(lado=="Right_sided"),
                                            0.000,0.025)),digits=5)))
  }
}


RI.percentil <- check_all_values(outside1 = outside.refineR.2,
                                 outside2 = outside.reflimR.2)

LRL.percentil.1 <- RI.percentil$LRL

LRL.percentil <- round(ifelse(needs_log_transform == TRUE,
                       InvBoxCox(LRL.percentil.1, lambda.LabRI),LRL.percentil.1),
                       digits = casa.decimal2)

URL.percentil.1 <- RI.percentil$URL

URL.percentil <- round(ifelse(needs_log_transform == TRUE,
                       InvBoxCox(URL.percentil.1, lambda.LabRI),URL.percentil.1),
                       digits = casa.decimal2)


URL.isolated.percentil <- ifelse(is.na(URL.isolated.cluster),
                          ifelse(is.na(URL.percentil),NA,
                          URL.percentil),URL.isolated.cluster)

LRL.isolated.percentil <- ifelse(is.na(LRL.isolated.cluster),
                          ifelse(is.na(LRL.percentil),NA,
                          LRL.percentil),LRL.isolated.cluster)


##### 3.2.22.3. Step 3: pD_RL Haeckel approach and weighted mean RI


cat('
<br>
<div style="text-align: justify; line-height: 1.8; color: #0033CC; font-size: 1.2em;">
<p><strong>3.2.3.2. Multi-cluster scenario: consensus reference interval estimation with controlled winsorization</strong></p>
</div>
<br>
')

Haeckel_approach1 <- function(LI_IR, 
                              LS_IR, 
                              variable = "all", 
                              decimals = 2) {
  
  if (missing(LS_IR) || missing(LI_IR)) {
    stop("Please provide values for LS_IR and LI_IR.")
  }
  if (!is.numeric(LS_IR) || !is.numeric(LI_IR)) {
    stop("LS_IR and LI_IR must be numeric values.")
  }
  if (!is.numeric(decimals) || decimals < 0) {
    stop("decimals must be a non-negative integer.")
  }

  CV_E <- sqrt(exp(((log(LS_IR) - log(ifelse(is.na(LI_IR) || LI_IR == 0,
                                             ifelse(is.na(LS_IR), NA, 
                                                    0.15 * LS_IR), LI_IR))) / 
                                                    3.92)^2) - 1)
  
  pCV_A <- (sqrt(CV_E * 100 - 0.25)) / 100
  
  Med <- if (is.na(LI_IR) & is.na(LS_IR)) {
    NA
  } else {
    sqrt(ifelse(LI_IR == "" || LI_IR == 0,
                ifelse(LS_IR == "", NA, 0.15 * LS_IR), LI_IR) * LS_IR)
  }
  
  pS_A.Med <- pCV_A * Med
  
  Slope <- if (Med == 0) {
    NA
  } else {
    (pS_A.Med - 0.2 * pS_A.Med) / Med
  }

  Intercept <- (0.2 * pS_A.Med)

  pS_A.LI <- (ifelse(LI_IR == "", ifelse(LS_IR == "", NA, 
                                         0.15 * LS_IR), 
                     LI_IR) * Slope) + (0.2 * pS_A.Med)
  
  pS_A.LS <- (LS_IR * Slope) + (0.2 * pS_A.Med)
  
  pD_LI <- round(1.645 * pS_A.LI, decimals)
  pD_LS <- round(1.645 * pS_A.LS, decimals)

  results_table <- data.frame(CV_E, pCV_A, Med, pS_A.Med, 
                              Slope, Intercept,
                              pS_A.LI, pS_A.LS, pD_LI, pD_LS)
  
  if (variable == "all") {
    return(results_table)
  } else if (variable %in% names(results_table)) {
    return(results_table[[variable]])
  } else {
    stop("The specified variable is not in the results table.")
  }
}

mean.LRL <- median(c(LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
                     LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
                     LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                     LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                     LRL.isolated.percentil),
                     na.rm = TRUE)

mean.URL <- median(c(URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
                     URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
                     URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                     URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                     URL.isolated.percentil),
                     na.rm = TRUE)

IR.pD.Haeckel_approach1 <- Haeckel_approach1(mean.LRL,mean.URL)

LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1 <- mean.LRL-IR.pD.Haeckel_approach1$pD_LI
LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1 <- ifelse(LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1<0,0,
                                    LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1)

UTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1 <- mean.LRL+IR.pD.Haeckel_approach1$pD_LI

LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1 <- mean.URL-IR.pD.Haeckel_approach1$pD_LS
LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1 <- ifelse(LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1<0,0,
                                    LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1)

UTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1 <- mean.URL+IR.pD.Haeckel_approach1$pD_LS


##### 3.2.22.4. Step 4: Winsorization of the Reference Limits ##################


Two.stage_Winso <- function(LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1,
                            UTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1,
                            LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1,
                            UTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1,
                            LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
                            LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                            LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
                            LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                            LRL.isolated.percentil,
                            URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
                            URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                            URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
                            URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                            URL.isolated.percentil){

  LRL.faixa.windsor.Haeckel_approach1 <- c(LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1,
                                           UTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1)

  URL.faixa.windsor.Haeckel_approach1 <- c(LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1,
                                           UTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1)

  lista.LRL <- c(LRL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.1, 
                 LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                 LRL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.2,
                 LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                 ifelse(k.new==1,NA,LRL.isolated.percentil))

  lista.URL <- c(URL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.1, 
                 URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                 URL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.2, 
                 URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                 ifelse(k.new==1,NA,URL.isolated.percentil))

  lista.URL.wind <- winsorize(lista.URL,
                              threshold = URL.faixa.windsor.Haeckel_approach1,
                              method = "raw")

  lista.URL.wind.2 <- winsorize(lista.URL.wind,
                                threshold = 1,
                                method = "zscore")

  lista.LRL.wind <- winsorize(lista.LRL,
                              threshold = LRL.faixa.windsor.Haeckel_approach1,
                              method = "raw")

  lista.LRL.wind.2 <- winsorize(lista.LRL.wind,
                                threshold = 0.5,
                                robust = TRUE,
                                method = "zscore")

  result <- list(List.LRL.Winsorized = lista.LRL.wind.2, 
                 List.URL.Winsorized = lista.URL.wind.2)
    
  return(result)
}


Winsorization_RL <- Two.stage_Winso(LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1=LTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1,
                                    UTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1=UTL_LRL.Haeckel_approach1,
                                    LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1=LTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1,
                                    UTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1=UTL_URL.Haeckel_approach1,
                                    LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1=LRL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.1,
                                    LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1=LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                    LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2=LRL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.2,
                                    LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2=LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                    LRL.isolated.percentil=LRL.isolated.percentil,
                                    URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1=URL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.1,
                                    URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1=URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                    URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2=URL.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.2,
                                    URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2=URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                    URL.isolated.percentil=URL.isolated.percentil)

lista.URL.wind.2 <- Winsorization_RL$List.URL.Winsorized
lista.LRL.wind.2 <- Winsorization_RL$List.LRL.Winsorized


##### 3.2.22.5. Step 5: K-means Reference limits ###############################


###### 3.2.22.5.1. Centroid Reference Limits Algorithm


if (is.na(ifelse(k.new == 1, NA, LRL.isolated.percentil)) && 
    is.na(ifelse(k.new == 1, NA, URL.isolated.percentil))) {

  get_kmeans_limits_and_plot <- function(LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1, 
                                         LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                         LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2, 
                                         LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                         URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1, 
                                         URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                         URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2, 
                                         URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2) {
    
    require(cluster)
    require(ggplot2)
    require(plotly)
    require(ggtext) 
    
    limites <- data.frame(
      Metodo = c(
        "refineR_dados_originais", 
        "reflimR_dados_originais", 
        "refineR_primeira_limpeza", 
        "reflimR_primeira_limpeza"
      ),
      Limite_inferior = c(
        LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
        LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
        LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
        LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2
      ),
      Limite_superior = c(
        URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
        URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
        URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
        URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2
      )
    )
    
    kmeans_result <- kmeans(
      limites[, c("Limite_inferior", "Limite_superior")],
      algorithm = "Hartigan-Wong",
      centers = 1
    )
    
    limite_inferior_escolhido <- kmeans_result$centers[1, "Limite_inferior"]
    limite_superior_escolhido <- kmeans_result$centers[1, "Limite_superior"]
    
    limites$Cluster <- factor(kmeans_result$cluster)
    
    x_limits <- range(limites$Limite_inferior, limite_inferior_escolhido, na.rm = TRUE)
    y_limits <- range(limites$Limite_superior, limite_superior_escolhido, na.rm = TRUE)
    
####### 3.2.22.5.1.1. Generate Fig.21 only when k.new > 1
    
    if (isTRUE(k.new > 1)) {
      
      p_base <- ggplot(
        limites,
        aes(
          x = Limite_inferior,
          y = Limite_superior,
          color = as.factor(Cluster)
        )
      ) +
        geom_point(
          size = 4,
          shape = 21,
          fill = "#FFA3D1",
          color = "black"
        ) +
        geom_point(
          aes(
            x = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            y = limite_superior_escolhido
          ),
          color = "blue",
          size = 5,
          shape = 8,
          stroke = 1
        ) + 
        geom_segment(
          aes(
            x = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            xend = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            y = y_limits[1],
            yend = limite_superior_escolhido
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "blue"
        ) +
        geom_segment(
          aes(
            x = x_limits[1],
            xend = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            y = limite_superior_escolhido,
            yend = limite_superior_escolhido
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "blue"
        ) +
        geom_hline(
          yintercept = 0,
          linetype = "solid",
          color = "black"
        ) + 
        geom_vline(
          xintercept = 0,
          linetype = "solid",
          color = "black"
        ) + 
        scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits) +
        theme(
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
          plot.title = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(size = 10, face = "bold")
        )
      
      p2 <- p_base +
        labs(
          x = "Lower reference limit",
          y = "Upper reference limit"
        )
      
      p1 <- p_base +
        labs(
          title = "Fig. 21. Reference Limits with K-means Centroid.",
          x = "Lower reference limit",
          y = "Upper reference limit"
        )
      
      p1 <- plotly::ggplotly(p1)
      
    } else {
      
      p1 <- NULL
      p2 <- NULL
      
    }
    
    return(
      list(
        limite_inferior_escolhido = limite_inferior_escolhido,
        limite_superior_escolhido = limite_superior_escolhido,
        reference_limits = limites,
        plot1 = p1,
        plot2 = p2
      )
    )
  }
  
  refineR.reflim.kmeans <- get_kmeans_limits_and_plot(
    lista.LRL.wind.2[1],  
    lista.LRL.wind.2[2],  
    lista.LRL.wind.2[3],  
    lista.LRL.wind.2[4],
    lista.URL.wind.2[1], 
    lista.URL.wind.2[2], 
    lista.URL.wind.2[3], 
    lista.URL.wind.2[4]
  )
  
} else {
  
  get_kmeans_limits_and_plot <- function(LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1, 
                                         LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                         LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2, 
                                         LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                         LRL.isolated.percentil,
                                         URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1, 
                                         URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                         URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2, 
                                         URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                         URL.isolated.percentil) {
    
    require(cluster)
    require(ggplot2)
    require(plotly)
    require(ggtext) 
    
    limites <- data.frame(
      Metodo = c(
        "refineR_dados_originais", 
        "reflimR_dados_originais", 
        "refineR_primeira_limpeza", 
        "reflimR_primeira_limpeza",
        "EM_Algorithm_Percentiles"
      ),
      Limite_inferior = c(
        LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
        LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
        LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
        LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
        LRL.isolated.percentil
      ),
      Limite_superior = c(
        URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1,
        URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1,
        URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2,
        URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2,
        URL.isolated.percentil
      )
    )
    
    kmeans_result <- kmeans(
      limites[, c("Limite_inferior", "Limite_superior")],
      algorithm = "Hartigan-Wong",
      centers = 1
    )
    
    limite_inferior_escolhido <- kmeans_result$centers[1, "Limite_inferior"]
    limite_superior_escolhido <- kmeans_result$centers[1, "Limite_superior"]
    
    limites$Cluster <- factor(kmeans_result$cluster)
    
    x_limits <- range(limites$Limite_inferior, limite_inferior_escolhido, na.rm = TRUE)
    y_limits <- range(limites$Limite_superior, limite_superior_escolhido, na.rm = TRUE)
    
####### 3.2.22.5.1.2. Generate Fig.21 only when k.new > 1
    
    if (isTRUE(k.new > 1)) {
      
      p_base <- ggplot(
        limites,
        aes(
          x = Limite_inferior,
          y = Limite_superior,
          color = as.factor(Cluster)
        )
      ) +
        geom_point(
          size = 4,
          shape = 21,
          fill = "#FFA3D1",
          color = "black"
        ) +
        geom_point(
          aes(
            x = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            y = limite_superior_escolhido
          ),
          color = "blue",
          size = 5,
          shape = 8,
          stroke = 1
        ) + 
        geom_segment(
          aes(
            x = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            xend = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            y = y_limits[1],
            yend = limite_superior_escolhido
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "blue"
        ) +
        geom_segment(
          aes(
            x = x_limits[1],
            xend = limite_inferior_escolhido,
            y = limite_superior_escolhido,
            yend = limite_superior_escolhido
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "blue"
        ) +
        geom_hline(
          yintercept = 0,
          linetype = "solid",
          color = "black"
        ) + 
        geom_vline(
          xintercept = 0,
          linetype = "solid",
          color = "black"
        ) + 
        scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits) +
        theme(
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
          plot.title = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(size = 10, face = "bold")
        )
      
      p2 <- p_base +
        labs(
          x = "Lower reference limit",
          y = "Upper reference limit"
        )
      
      p1 <- p_base +
        labs(
          title = "Fig. 21. Reference Limits with K-means Centroid.",
          x = "Lower reference limit",
          y = "Upper reference limit"
        )
      
      p1 <- plotly::ggplotly(p1)
      
    } else {
      
      p1 <- NULL
      p2 <- NULL
      
    }
    
    return(
      list(
        limite_inferior_escolhido = limite_inferior_escolhido,
        limite_superior_escolhido = limite_superior_escolhido,
        reference_limits = limites,
        plot1 = p1,
        plot2 = p2
      )
    )
  }
  
  refineR.reflim.kmeans <- get_kmeans_limits_and_plot(
    lista.LRL.wind.2[1],  
    lista.LRL.wind.2[2],  
    lista.LRL.wind.2[3],  
    lista.LRL.wind.2[4],
    lista.LRL.wind.2[5],
    lista.URL.wind.2[1], 
    lista.URL.wind.2[2], 
    lista.URL.wind.2[3], 
    lista.URL.wind.2[4],
    lista.URL.wind.2[5]
  )
}

URL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans <- round(refineR.reflim.kmeans$limite_superior_escolhido,
                        digits=casa.decimal2) 

LRL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans <- round(refineR.reflim.kmeans$limite_inferior_escolhido,
                                       digits=casa.decimal2) 

LRL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans <- ifelse(LRL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans<0,0,
                                        LRL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans)

RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans <- paste(LRL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans,
                                   " to ",
                                   URL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans)


##### 3.2.22.6. Step 6: Table 15 and Fig. RIs before and #######################
##### after Winsorization and k-means ##########################################


IR.refineR.cenario.1.wind <- paste(round(lista.LRL.wind.2[1],casa.decimal2),
                                   " to ", 
                                   round(lista.URL.wind.2[1],casa.decimal2))

IR.refineR.cenario.2.wind <- paste(round(lista.LRL.wind.2[3],casa.decimal2),
                                   " to ", 
                                   round(lista.URL.wind.2[3],casa.decimal2))

IR.reflimR.cenario.1.wind <- paste(round(lista.LRL.wind.2[2],casa.decimal2),
                                   " to ", 
                                   round(lista.URL.wind.2[2],casa.decimal2))

IR.reflimR.cenario.2.wind <- paste(round(lista.LRL.wind.2[4],casa.decimal2),
                                   " to ", 
                                   round(lista.URL.wind.2[4],casa.decimal2))


IR.EM.Algorithm <- ifelse(k.new==1,"Option disabled",
                          ifelse(is.na(LRL.isolated.percentil) == TRUE &
                          is.na(URL.isolated.percentil) == TRUE,"Option disabled",
                          paste(round(LRL.isolated.percentil,casa.decimal2),
                          " to ",round(URL.isolated.percentil,casa.decimal2))))


IR.EM.Algorithm.wind <- ifelse(k.new==1,"Option disabled",
                        ifelse(is.na(LRL.isolated.percentil) == TRUE &
                        is.na(URL.isolated.percentil) == TRUE,"Option disabled",
                        paste(round(lista.LRL.wind.2[5],casa.decimal2),
                        " to ",round(lista.URL.wind.2[5],casa.decimal2))))


lista.RIs <- c(select.method,
               "RI reflimR",
               "EM Algorithm")

lista.RIs.before.before.windsor <- c(IR.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.1,
                                     IR.reflimR.cenario.1,
                                     " --- ")  

lista.RIs.after.before.windsor <- c(IR.refineR.reflimR.NP.fallback.cenario.2,
                                    IR.reflimR.cenario.2,
                                    IR.EM.Algorithm)  

lista.RIs.before.after.windsor <- c(IR.refineR.cenario.1.wind,
                                    IR.reflimR.cenario.1.wind,
                                    " --- ")  

lista.RIs.after.after.windsor <- c(IR.refineR.cenario.2.wind,
                                   IR.reflimR.cenario.2.wind,
                                   IR.EM.Algorithm.wind)  

lista.RI.kmeans <- c(RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans,
                     RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans,
                     RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans)


Table.15.data.frame <- if (k.new > 1) {
  
  data.frame(lista.RIs,
             lista.RIs.before.before.windsor,
             lista.RIs.after.before.windsor,
             lista.RIs.before.after.windsor,
             lista.RIs.after.after.windsor,
             lista.RI.kmeans)
  
} else {
  
  data.frame(lista.RIs,
             "Option disabled",
             "Option disabled",
             "Option disabled",
             "Option disabled",
             "Option disabled")
}

col_names.Table.15 <- c("Algorithm used",
                        "RI before cleaning",
                        "RI after cleaning",
                        "RI before cleaning",
                        "RI after cleaning",
                        "Centroid RI")


footnote.table.15 <- paste("<div style='text-align: justify; color: black;'><strong>RI</strong>,  reference interval. <strong>EM</strong>, Expectation–Maximization (EM).</div>")

titulo.tabela.15 <- paste("<div style='text-align: justify; color: black;'><strong>Table 15.</strong> Consensus reference interval estimates using winsorized limits from refineR and reflimR, with EM-based estimates included when applicable (multi-cluster truncated distributions).</div>")

Table.15 <- kbl(Table.15.data.frame,
                align = "cccccc",
                col.names = col_names.Table.15, 
                caption = titulo.tabela.15,
                escape = FALSE,
                format = "html", 
                table.attr = "style='text-align: justify; line-height: 1.8; color: #000000; font-size: 1em;'") |>
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Before Winsorization" = 2, "After Winsorization" = 3),
                   bold = TRUE, color = "White",background = "#0d47a1") |>
  collapse_rows(columns = 6) |>
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE,
                bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", 
                                      "condensed", 
                                      "responsive")) |>
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "White", background = "#0d47a1") |>
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE, color = "White", background = "#1976d2") |> 
  footnote(general_title = "<div style='text-align: justify; color: black;'>Footnote</div>",
           general = footnote.table.15, escape = FALSE)

cat(as.character(Table.15))

cat('
<br><br>
')


if (isTRUE(k.new > 1)) {

  Fig.21 <- refineR.reflim.kmeans$plot1
  Fig.21.new <- refineR.reflim.kmeans$plot2

  if (!is.null(Fig.21.new)) {

    jpeg(
      filename = "3_Outputs/Figures/Fig.21.jpeg", 
      width = 6 * 600,
      height = 4 * 600, 
      units = "px",
      res = 600,
      quality = 100
    )

    print(Fig.21.new)

    invisible(dev.off())

    rm(Fig.21.new)
  }

  if (!is.null(Fig.21)) {
    htmltools::tagList(Fig.21)
  }
}

}


################################################################################  
##### 3.2.23. lambdas dataset ##################################################
################################################################################


val.lambda.refineR.1 <- if (is.na(val.LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.1) && is.na(val.URL.RI.refineR.cenario.1)) {
  "NA"
} else {
  lambda.refineR.1
}

val.lambda.refineR.2 <- if (is.na(val.LRL.RI.refineR.cenario.2) && is.na(val.URL.RI.refineR.cenario.2)) {
  "NA"
} else {
  lambda.refineR.2
}


val.lambda.reflimR.1 <- if (is.na(val.LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1) && is.na(val.URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.1)) {
  "NA"
} else {
  lambda.reflimR.1
}

val.lambda.reflimR.2 <- if (is.na(val.LRL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2) && is.na(val.URL.RI.reflimR.cenario.2)) {
  "NA"
} else {
  lambda.reflimR.2
}


lambdas.dataset <- data.frame(
  parameter = c(
    "lambda refineR before data cleaning",
    "lambda.refineR after data cleaning",
    "lambda.reflimR before data cleaning",
    "lambda.reflimR after data cleaning",
    "lambda loglik"
  ),
  value = c(
    val.lambda.refineR.1,
    val.lambda.refineR.2,
    val.lambda.reflimR.1,
    val.lambda.reflimR.2,
    lambda.LabRI
  )
)

write_xlsx(lambdas.dataset,
           "3_Outputs/Spreadsheets/3_lambdas_dataset.xlsx")
```

<br> <br> <br>

### 3.3. Estimated Reference Interval

<br>

```{r Stage_3_3_Estimated_reference_Interval,echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}

################################################################################
#### 3.3.1. Reloading packages #################################################
################################################################################


set.seed(200707042)
library(KernSmooth)
library(plotly)
library(mixR)


################################################################################
#### 3.3.2. RI LabRI ###########################################################
################################################################################


URL.RI.LabRI<-round(ifelse(n.clusters.habili==1,URL.RI.LabRI.1.cluster,
                           URL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans),casa.decimal2)

URL.RI.LabRI.2<-ifelse(is.na(URL.RI.LabRI)==TRUE,"---",
                       round(URL.RI.LabRI,digits = casa.decimal))


LRL.RI.LabRI<-round(ifelse(n.clusters.habili==1,LRL.RI.LabRI.1.cluster,
                           LRL.RI.refineR.reflimR.kmeans),casa.decimal2)

LRL.RI.LabRI<-ifelse(lado=="Right_sided",0,LRL.RI.LabRI)


LRL.RI.LabRI.2<-ifelse(is.na(LRL.RI.LabRI)==TRUE,"---",
                    round(LRL.RI.LabRI,digits = casa.decimal))

IR.LabRI<-paste(LRL.RI.LabRI.2,"to",
                URL.RI.LabRI.2)


################################################################################
#### 3.3.3. Within-estimation margin of error ##################################
################################################################################


Media<-mean(dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado)
Moda<-multimode::locmodes(dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado,mod0=1)$locations
Mediana<-median(dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado)

Midpoint_IR<-round(ifelse(Media>Mediana & Media>Moda & 
             Mediana>Moda,Moda,ifelse(Moda>Mediana & 
             Moda>Media & Mediana>Media,Moda,Mediana)),digits = casa.decimal2)


################################################################################
#### 3.3.4. CI for RLs via Parametric Bootstrap through Monte Carlo simulation #
################################################################################


n.bootstrap <- ifelse(n.truncado.clusters < 1000, 15000,
                      ifelse(n.truncado.clusters > 50000, 1000, 10000))


MC_paramboot_CI <- function(n,
                            midpoint,
                            LRL, URL,
                            lambda,
                            conf.level   = 0.95,
                            lado         = "Two_sided",
                            seed         = 200707042,
                            plot.it      = TRUE,
                            main         = NULL,
                            xlab         = "simulated values",
                            Title        = "",
                            n.sim        = n.bootstrap,
                            max.combined = 100000,
                            chunk.size   = NULL) {

##### 3.3.4.1. Reloading packages and Functions ###############################

  require(grid)
  require(matrixStats)

  box_cox <- function(x, lambda) {
    if (abs(lambda - 1) < 1e-10) {
      return(x)
    } else if (abs(lambda) < 1e-10) {
      return(log(x))
    } else {
      return((x^lambda - 1) / lambda)
    }
  }

  box_cox_inv <- function(y, lambda) {
    if (abs(lambda - 1) < 1e-10) {
      return(y)
    } else if (abs(lambda) < 1e-10) {
      return(exp(y))
    } else {
      y <- lambda * y + 1
      y[y < 1e-12] <- 1e-12
      return(y^(1 / lambda))
    }
  }

  set.seed(seed)

##### 3.3.4.2. Validations ####################################################

  valid.sides <- c("Two_sided", "Right_sided", "one_sided_lower")
  if (!lado %in% valid.sides) {
    stop(paste("lado must be one of:", paste(valid.sides, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  if (lado == "Two_sided" && URL <= LRL) stop("URL must be greater than LRL")
  if (lado == "Right_sided" && URL <= 0) stop("URL must be > 0 for one-sided upper")
  if (lado == "one_sided_lower" && LRL <= 0) {
    stop("LRL must be > 0 for one-sided lower (Box-Cox requires positive values)")
  }
  if (n < 40) stop("The sample size should be at least 40")
  if (any(conf.level <= 0 | conf.level >= 1)) {
    stop("conf.level must be between 0 and 1 (e.g., 0.90, 0.95, 0.99)")
  }
  if (midpoint <= 0) stop("midpoint must be > 0 (Box-Cox requires positive values)")

##### 3.3.4.3. Define percentile probabilities and recover mu/sigma ###########

  if (lado == "Two_sided") {
    probs.LRL <- 0.025
    probs.URL <- 0.975
    LRL.t   <- box_cox(LRL, lambda)
    URL.t   <- box_cox(URL, lambda)
    sigma.t <- (URL.t - LRL.t) / (2 * qnorm(probs.URL))
    mu.t    <- (URL.t + LRL.t) / 2
  } else if (lado == "Right_sided") {
    probs.LRL <- NA
    probs.URL <- 0.95
    mu.t    <- box_cox(midpoint, lambda)
    URL.t   <- box_cox(URL, lambda)
    sigma.t <- (URL.t - mu.t) / qnorm(probs.URL)
  } else if (lado == "one_sided_lower") {
    probs.LRL <- 0.05
    probs.URL <- NA
    mu.t    <- box_cox(midpoint, lambda)
    LRL.t   <- box_cox(LRL, lambda)
    sigma.t <- (mu.t - LRL.t) / abs(qnorm(probs.LRL))
  }
  if (sigma.t <= 0) stop("Recovered sigma <= 0. Check input values.")

  total.values <- as.numeric(n.sim) * n

##### 3.3.4.4. Steps CI via parametric bootstrap Monte Carlo simulation #######

###### 3.3.4.4.0. Chunking: scales blocks to limit memory spikes

  if (is.null(chunk.size)) {
    target.bytes <- 50 * 1024^2                         
    chunk.size   <- max(50, min(n.sim, floor(target.bytes / (8 * n))))
  }
  n.chunks <- ceiling(n.sim / chunk.size)

###### 3.3.4.4.1. Pre-allocations

  sim.LRL <- if (!is.na(probs.LRL)) numeric(n.sim) else NULL
  sim.URL <- if (!is.na(probs.URL)) numeric(n.sim) else NULL

  n.per.chunk  <- ceiling(max.combined / n.chunks)
  combined.cap <- n.per.chunk * n.chunks                
  combined     <- numeric(combined.cap)
  comb.pos     <- 0L

###### 3.3.4.4.2. Loop em chunks

  for (k in seq_len(n.chunks)) {

    i.start <- (k - 1L) * chunk.size + 1L
    i.end   <- min(k * chunk.size, n.sim)
    b       <- i.end - i.start + 1L

###### 3.3.4.4.2.1. Generation + inverse Box-Cox transformation in the same block
    
    chunk <- matrix(rnorm(b * n, mean = mu.t, sd = sigma.t),
                    nrow = b, ncol = n)
    chunk <- box_cox_inv(chunk, lambda)

###### 3.3.4.4.2.2. Quantiles per row
    
    if (!is.null(sim.LRL)) {
      sim.LRL[i.start:i.end] <- matrixStats::rowQuantiles(
        chunk, probs = probs.LRL, useNames = FALSE
      )
    }
    if (!is.null(sim.URL)) {
      sim.URL[i.start:i.end] <- matrixStats::rowQuantiles(
        chunk, probs = probs.URL, useNames = FALSE
      )
    }

###### 3.3.4.4.2.3. Reservoir for "combined" (subsampling by chunk)
    
    take <- min(n.per.chunk, length(chunk))
    if (take > 0) {
      idx <- sample.int(length(chunk), take)
      combined[(comb.pos + 1L):(comb.pos + take)] <- chunk[idx]
      comb.pos <- comb.pos + take
    }

    rm(chunk)
  }

###### 3.3.4.4.2.4. Trim reservoir and remove non-finite particles
  
  combined <- combined[seq_len(comb.pos)]
  combined <- combined[is.finite(combined)]
  if (length(combined) > max.combined) {
    combined <- combined[sample.int(length(combined), max.combined)]
  }
  gc(verbose = FALSE)

###### 3.3.4.4.3. STEP 3 - CI for each confidence level (pre-allocated)

  n.cl <- length(conf.level)
  ci_results <- data.frame(
    conf.level    = numeric(n.cl),
    lower.lim.low = numeric(n.cl),
    lower.lim.upp = numeric(n.cl),
    upper.lim.low = numeric(n.cl),
    upper.lim.upp = numeric(n.cl)
  )

  for (i in seq_along(conf.level)) {
    cl    <- conf.level[i]
    alpha <- 1 - cl
    q.lo  <- alpha / 2
    q.hi  <- 1 - alpha / 2

    if (!is.null(sim.LRL)) {
      ll.low <- quantile(sim.LRL, q.lo, names = FALSE)
      ll.upp <- quantile(sim.LRL, q.hi, names = FALSE)
    } else {
      ll.low <- NA; ll.upp <- NA
    }
    if (!is.null(sim.URL)) {
      ul.low <- quantile(sim.URL, q.lo, names = FALSE)
      ul.upp <- quantile(sim.URL, q.hi, names = FALSE)
    } else {
      ul.low <- NA; ul.upp <- NA
    }

    ci_results[i, ] <- list(
      conf.level    = cl,
      lower.lim.low = round(ll.low, 4),
      lower.lim.upp = round(ll.upp, 4),
      upper.lim.low = round(ul.low, 4),
      upper.lim.upp = round(ul.upp, 4)
    )
  }

###### 3.3.4.4.4. STEP 4 - Plot function (ggplot2 + patchwork) ################

  
  plot_fn <- function(Title_override = NULL) {

    require(ggplot2)
    require(patchwork)

    cl_use <- conf.level[1]
    row_ci <- ci_results[ci_results$conf.level == cl_use, ]

    col.lower.main   <- "#E53935"
    col.lower.light  <- "#E57373"
    col.upper.main   <- "#1976D2"
    col.upper.light  <- "#64B5F6"

    plot.main <- if (!is.null(Title_override)) Title_override else
                 if (!is.null(main))           main          else Title

    plot.sub <- paste("Midpoint =", midpoint,
                      "| CI:", paste0(cl_use * 100, "%"),
                      "| Side:", lado,
                      "| Pooled simulated values:", format(total.values, scientific = FALSE),
                      "| Subsampling:", format(max.combined, scientific = FALSE))

    theme_mc <- theme_bw(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
      theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"),
        axis.title    = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.text     = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position   = "bottom",
        legend.text       = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.key.width  = grid::unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.height = grid::unit(0.3, "cm"),
        legend.spacing.x  = grid::unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.margin     = margin(t = 2, b = 2),
        plot.margin       = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 5, l = 10)
      )

##### 3.3.4.5. Plots ###########################################################

###### 3.3.4.5.1. PANEL 1: Histograma de combined

    plot.lo   <- quantile(combined, 0.001)
    plot.hi   <- quantile(combined, 0.999)
    plot.data <- combined[combined >= plot.lo & combined <= plot.hi]
    df_comb   <- data.frame(x = plot.data)

    p1 <- ggplot(df_comb, aes(x = x)) +
      geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count)),
                     bins = 80, fill = "gray80", color = "gray60",
                     linewidth = 0.2) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(plot.lo, plot.hi)) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = waiver(), n.breaks = 10, expand = waiver()) +
      labs(title = plot.main, subtitle = plot.sub,
           x = xlab, y = "Absolute Frequency") +
      theme_mc +
      theme(
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8.5, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.line       = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks      = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4),
        axis.text       = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
        axis.title      = element_text(size = 10, color = "black")
      )

    p1 <- p1 + geom_vline(xintercept = midpoint, color = "black",
                          linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "twodash")

    if (!is.null(sim.LRL)) {
      p1 <- p1 +
        annotate("rect",
                 xmin = row_ci$lower.lim.low, xmax = row_ci$lower.lim.upp,
                 ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
                 fill = col.lower.main, alpha = 0.12) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = LRL, color = col.lower.main,
                   linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "solid") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$lower.lim.low, color = col.lower.light,
                   linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$lower.lim.upp, color = col.lower.light,
                   linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed")
    }

    if (!is.null(sim.URL)) {
      p1 <- p1 +
        annotate("rect",
                 xmin = row_ci$upper.lim.low, xmax = row_ci$upper.lim.upp,
                 ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
                 fill = col.upper.main, alpha = 0.12) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = URL, color = col.upper.main,
                   linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "solid") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$upper.lim.low, color = col.upper.light,
                   linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$upper.lim.upp, color = col.upper.light,
                   linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed")
    }

###### 3.3.4.5.2. PANEL 2: Distribuição LRL

    if (!is.null(sim.LRL)) {

      df_lrl  <- data.frame(x = sim.LRL)
      med_lrl <- median(sim.LRL)

      p2 <- ggplot(df_lrl, aes(x = x)) +
        geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count)),
                       bins  = 60,
                       fill  = adjustcolor(col.lower.main, alpha.f = 0.25),
                       color = adjustcolor(col.lower.main, alpha.f = 0.5),
                       linewidth = 0.2) +
        annotate("rect",
                 xmin = row_ci$lower.lim.low, xmax = row_ci$lower.lim.upp,
                 ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
                 fill = col.lower.main, alpha = 0.12) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = LRL, color = col.lower.main,
                   linewidth = 1.3, linetype = "solid") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = med_lrl, color = col.lower.main,
                   linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dotted") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$lower.lim.low, color = col.lower.light,
                   linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$lower.lim.upp, color = col.lower.light,
                   linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = waiver(), n.breaks = 8, expand = waiver()) +
        labs(title = paste(sprintf("LRL = %.2f", LRL),
                           "|", n.sim, "Bootstrap replications"),
             subtitle = sprintf("CI %d%%: %.4f to %.4f",
                                cl_use * 100,
                                row_ci$lower.lim.low, row_ci$lower.lim.upp),
             x = xlab, y = "Absolute Frequency") +
        theme_mc +
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9.5, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.line  = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4),
          axis.text  = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black")
        )

      p2 <- p2 +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("LRL LabRI = %.2f", LRL)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 1.3, na.rm = TRUE) +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("Median = %.2f", med_lrl)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("Midpoint = %.2f", midpoint)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("CI %d%%", cl_use * 100)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 0.9, na.rm = TRUE) +
        scale_color_manual(
          name = NULL,
          values = stats::setNames(
            c(col.lower.main, col.lower.main, "black", col.lower.light),
            c(sprintf("LRL LabRI = %.2f", LRL),
              sprintf("Median = %.2f", med_lrl),
              sprintf("Midpoint = %.2f", midpoint),
              sprintf("CI %d%%", cl_use * 100))
          )
        ) +
        scale_linetype_manual(
          name = NULL,
          values = stats::setNames(
            c("solid", "dotted", "solid", "dashed"),
            c(sprintf("LRL LabRI = %.2f", LRL),
              sprintf("Median = %.2f", med_lrl),
              sprintf("Midpoint = %.2f", midpoint),
              sprintf("CI %d%%", cl_use * 100))
          )
        ) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2),
               linetype = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

    } else {
      p2 <- NULL
    }

###### 3.3.4.5.3. PANEL 3: Distribuição URL

    if (!is.null(sim.URL)) {

      df_url  <- data.frame(x = sim.URL)
      med_url <- median(sim.URL)

      p3 <- ggplot(df_url, aes(x = x)) +
        geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count)),
                       bins  = 60,
                       fill  = adjustcolor(col.upper.main, alpha.f = 0.25),
                       color = adjustcolor(col.upper.main, alpha.f = 0.5),
                       linewidth = 0.2) +
        annotate("rect",
                 xmin = row_ci$upper.lim.low, xmax = row_ci$upper.lim.upp,
                 ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
                 fill = col.upper.main, alpha = 0.12) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = URL, color = col.upper.main,
                   linewidth = 1.3, linetype = "solid") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = med_url, color = col.upper.main,
                   linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dotted") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$upper.lim.low, color = col.upper.light,
                   linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = row_ci$upper.lim.upp, color = col.upper.light,
                   linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = waiver(), n.breaks = 8, expand = waiver()) +
        labs(title = paste(sprintf("URL = %.2f", URL),
                           "|", n.sim, "Bootstrap replications"),
             subtitle = sprintf("CI %d%%: %.4f to %.4f",
                                cl_use * 100,
                                row_ci$upper.lim.low, row_ci$upper.lim.upp),
             x = xlab, y = "Absolute Frequency") +
        theme_mc +
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9.5, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.line  = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4),
          axis.text  = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black")
        )

      p3 <- p3 +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("URL LabRI = %.2f", URL)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 1.3, na.rm = TRUE) +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("Median = %.2f", med_url)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("Midpoint = %.2f", midpoint)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
        geom_line(data = data.frame(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, g = sprintf("CI %d%%", cl_use * 100)),
                  aes(x = x, y = y, color = g, linetype = g), linewidth = 0.9, na.rm = TRUE) +
        scale_color_manual(
          name = NULL,
          values = stats::setNames(
            c(col.upper.main, col.upper.main, "black", col.upper.light),
            c(sprintf("URL LabRI = %.2f", URL),
              sprintf("Median = %.2f", med_url),
              sprintf("Midpoint = %.2f", midpoint),
              sprintf("CI %d%%", cl_use * 100))
          )
        ) +
        scale_linetype_manual(
          name = NULL,
          values = stats::setNames(
            c("solid", "dotted", "solid", "dashed"),
            c(sprintf("URL LabRI = %.2f", URL),
              sprintf("Median = %.2f", med_url),
              sprintf("Midpoint = %.2f", midpoint),
              sprintf("CI %d%%", cl_use * 100))
          )
        ) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2),
               linetype = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

    } else {
      p3 <- NULL
    }

###### 3.3.4.5.4. ASSEMBLE layout with patchwork

    if (lado == "Two_sided") {
      final_plot <- p1 / (p2 | p3) + plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 1))
    } else if (lado == "Right_sided") {
      final_plot <- p1 / p3 + plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 1))
    } else if (lado == "one_sided_lower") {
      final_plot <- p1 / p2 + plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 1))
    }

    print(final_plot)
    invisible(final_plot)
  }

##### 3.3.4.6. Draw the plot if requested #####################################

  if (plot.it) plot_fn()

##### 3.3.4.7. Output ##########################################################

  result <- list(
    combined             = combined,
    confidence.intervals = ci_results,
    mu.t                 = mu.t,
    sigma.t              = sigma.t,
    sim.LRL              = sim.LRL,
    sim.URL              = sim.URL,
    params               = list(
      n            = n,
      midpoint     = midpoint,
      LRL          = LRL,
      URL          = URL,
      lambda       = lambda,
      lado         = lado,
      n.sim        = n.sim,
      conf.level   = conf.level,
      max.combined = max.combined,
      total.values = total.values,
      chunk.size   = chunk.size,
      n.chunks     = n.chunks
    ),
    plot = plot_fn
  )

  invisible(result)
}

n.truncado.clusters.2 <- ifelse(n.truncado.clusters > 50000,
                                50000,n.truncado.clusters)

CI_RI_LabRI <- MC_paramboot_CI(
  n          = n.truncado.clusters.2,
  midpoint   = Midpoint_IR,
  LRL        = LRL.RI.LabRI,
  URL        = URL.RI.LabRI,
  lambda     = lambda.LabRI,
  conf.level = IC_IR_select2,
  lado       = lado,
  plot.it    = FALSE)


jpeg("3_Outputs/Figures/Fig.23.jpeg", 
     width = 8 * 600, height = 8 * 600, units = "px", 
     res = 600, quality = 100)

CI_RI_LabRI$plot("Confidence intervals for LabRI method via parametric bootstrap using Monte Carlo simulation")


invisible(dev.off())


################################################################################
#### 3.3.5. Expanded uncertainty associated with the RL ########################
################################################################################


IC_label<-paste(CI_RI_LabRI$confidence.intervals$conf.level*100,"% CI")


##### 3.3.5.1. URL Confidence Interval #########################################


UL.IC.URL.LabRI<-round(CI_RI_LabRI$confidence.intervals$upper.lim.upp,
                         digits = casa.decimal2)

LL.IC.URL.LabRI<-round(CI_RI_LabRI$confidence.intervals$upper.lim.low,
                           digits = casa.decimal2)

UL.IC.URL.LabRI<-ifelse(UL.IC.URL.LabRI=="---"|LL.IC.URL.LabRI>URL.RI.LabRI,NA,
                        round(UL.IC.URL.LabRI,digits = casa.decimal2))

LL.IC.URL.LabRI<-ifelse(LL.IC.URL.LabRI=="---"|LL.IC.URL.LabRI>URL.RI.LabRI,NA,
                        round(LL.IC.URL.LabRI,digits = casa.decimal2))

IC.URL.LabRI<-paste(LL.IC.URL.LabRI," to ",UL.IC.URL.LabRI)

IC.URL.LabRI<-paste(ifelse(is.na(LL.IC.URL.LabRI)==TRUE,"---",LL.IC.URL.LabRI),
                    " to ",
                    ifelse(is.na(UL.IC.URL.LabRI)==TRUE,"---",UL.IC.URL.LabRI))


##### 3.3.5.2. LRL Confidence Interval #########################################


UL.IC.LRL.LabRI<-round(CI_RI_LabRI$confidence.intervals$lower.lim.upp,
                           digits = casa.decimal2)

LL.IC.LRL.LabRI<-round(CI_RI_LabRI$confidence.intervals$lower.lim.low,
                           digits = casa.decimal2)

UL.IC.LRL.LabRI<-ifelse(LL.IC.LRL.LabRI<0 && LRL.RI.LabRI==0,NA,
                        round(UL.IC.LRL.LabRI,digits = casa.decimal2))

LL.IC.LRL.LabRI<-ifelse(LL.IC.LRL.LabRI<0 && LRL.RI.LabRI>0,0,
                        ifelse(LL.IC.LRL.LabRI<0 && LRL.RI.LabRI==0,NA,
                               round(LL.IC.LRL.LabRI,digits = casa.decimal2)))

IC.LRL.LabRI<-paste(ifelse(is.na(LL.IC.LRL.LabRI)==TRUE,"---",LL.IC.LRL.LabRI),
                    " to ",
                    ifelse(is.na(UL.IC.LRL.LabRI)==TRUE,"---",UL.IC.LRL.LabRI))


################################################################################
#### 3.3.6. Generating fit.3.hist object #######################################
################################################################################


fit.3<-mixfit(dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado,
              ncomp=k.new,family="normal",tol=1e-18,max_iter=10000,ev=ev)


lambda.hist.2<-fit.3$pi
mu.hist.2<-fit.3$mu


ID.coluna.mu.2<-function(k) {
  if (k.new==1) {return (c("1"))}
  else if (k.new==2){return (c("1","2"))}
  else if (k.new==3){return (c("1","2","3"))}
  else if (k.new==4){return (c("1","2","3","4"))}
  else if (k.new==5){return (c("1","2","3","4","5"))}
  else if (k.new==6){return (c("1", "2","3","4","5","6"))}
  else {return (c("1", "2","3","4","5","6","7"))}
  }
names(mu.hist.2)<-ID.coluna.mu.2(k=k.new)


sigma.hist.2<-fit.3$sd
posterior.hist.2<-fit.3$comp.prob


ID.coluna.posterior.2<-function(k) {
  if (k.new==1) {return (c("comp.1"))}
  else if (k.new==2){return (c("comp.1","comp.2"))}
  else if (k.new==3){return (c("comp.1","comp.2","comp.3"))}  
  else if (k.new==4){return (c("comp.1","comp.2","comp.3","comp.4"))}
  else if (k.new==5){return (c("comp.1","comp.2","comp.3","comp.4","comp.5"))}
  else if (k.new==6){return (c("comp.1", "comp.2","comp.3",
                               "comp.4","comp.5","comp.6"))}
  else {return (c("comp.1", "comp.2","comp.3","comp.4",
                  "comp.5","comp.6","comp.7"))}
  }
colnames(posterior.hist.2)<-ID.coluna.posterior.2(k=k.new)


x.hist.2<-fit.3$data


fit.3.his<-list(mu=mu.hist.2,sigma=sigma.hist.2,lambda=lambda.hist.2,
                posterior=posterior.hist.2,x=x.hist.2)


################################################################################
#### 3.3.7. Generating RI and CI from the LabRI Histogram ######################
################################################################################


LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1<-ifelse(is.na(LL.IC.LRL.LabRI)==TRUE,
                                 LRL.RI.LabRI,
                                 LL.IC.LRL.LabRI)

LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1<-ifelse(is.na(UL.IC.LRL.LabRI)==TRUE,
                                 LRL.RI.LabRI,
                                 UL.IC.LRL.LabRI)



LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1<-ifelse(is.na(LL.IC.URL.LabRI)==TRUE,
                                 URL.RI.LabRI,
                                 LL.IC.URL.LabRI)

LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1<-ifelse(is.na(UL.IC.URL.LabRI)==TRUE,
                                 URL.RI.LabRI,
                                 UL.IC.URL.LabRI)



LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new<-ifelse(is.na(LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1)==TRUE,
                              LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
                              LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1)
                                 
LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new<-ifelse(is.na(LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1)==TRUE,
                              LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
                              LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1)



LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new<-ifelse(is.na(LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1)==TRUE,
                              LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
                              LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1)
                                 
LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new<-ifelse(is.na(LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1)==TRUE,
                              LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
                              LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1)


LI.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1<-ifelse(is.na(LRL.RI.LabRI)==TRUE,URL.RI.LabRI,LRL.RI.LabRI)
LS.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1<-ifelse(is.na(URL.RI.LabRI)==TRUE,LRL.RI.LabRI,URL.RI.LabRI)


################################################################################
#### 3.3.8. Histogram with RI and CI LabRI #####################################
################################################################################


choose.nbreaks.2<-choose_nbreaks(dataset_orig_truncado$dataset_orig_truncado,
                                 digits = 5,
                                 use.np.method = isTRUE(use.np.method))


n.break.2<-choose.nbreaks.2$k

main_metodo.LabRI<-paste("Fig. 22. Reference Intervals for the LabRI Method.")

plot_hist_mix_gauss_4 <- function(EM) {
  require(ggplot2)
  
  x.seq <- with(EM, seq(min(x), max(x), length.out = 10000))
  
  pars <- with(EM, data.frame(
    comp   = colnames(posterior),
    mu     = mu,
    sigma  = sigma,
    lambda = lambda
  ))
  
  em.df <- data.frame(
    x = rep(x.seq, each = nrow(pars)),
    pars
  )
  
  em.df$y <- with(em.df, lambda * dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = sigma))
  
  ggplot(data.frame(x = EM$x), aes(x = x)) +
    geom_histogram(
      aes(y = after_stat(count)),
      fill = "#9CDEC8", 
      color = "#96D3BD", 
      alpha = 0.5, 
      linewidth = 0.2, 
      bins = n.break.2
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = waiver(), 
      n.breaks = 10, 
      expand = waiver()
    ) +
    labs(x = mensurando, y = "Absolute Frequency") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) + 
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#FFFFFF", color = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#FFFFFF", color = NA),
      panel.grid       = element_blank(),
      axis.line        = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = 11),
      legend.text      = element_text(colour = "black", size = 11),
      axis.text        = element_text(colour = "black", size = 11),
      plot.title       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold")
    )
}

hist.mix.gauss.4 <- plot_hist_mix_gauss_4(fit.3.his)

g <- ggplot_build(hist.mix.gauss.4)

density.max.hist.mix.gauss.4 <- max(g$data[[1]]$count, na.rm = TRUE)


Fig.22 <- hist.mix.gauss.4 + 
        
  labs(title = main_metodo.LabRI,
       x = mensurando, y = "Absolute Frequency") +
  geom_segment(aes(x = Midpoint_IR, xend = Midpoint_IR,
                   y = 0, yend = density.max.hist.mix.gauss.4),
               linetype = "twodash", color = "#404040", size = 0.4) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = LI.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
             linetype = "solid", color = "#E57373", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = LS.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
             linetype = "solid", color = "#4682B4", size = 0.6) +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           xmax = LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           ymin = 0, ymax = density.max.hist.mix.gauss.4,
           alpha = 0.2, fill = "#E53935") +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           xmax = LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           ymin = 0, ymax = density.max.hist.mix.gauss.4,
           alpha = 0.2, fill = "dodgerblue") +
  
  annotate("text", 
           x = LI.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("LRL\n", format(LI.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1, scientific = FALSE)),
           vjust = -0.3, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#E57373") +
  annotate("text", 
           x = LS.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("URL\n", format(LS.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1, scientific = FALSE)),
           vjust = -0.3, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#4682B4") +
  annotate("text", 
           x = Midpoint_IR, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Midpoint\n", format(Midpoint_IR, scientific = FALSE)),
           vjust = -0.2, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#404040") +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0,
      face  = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 35)        
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 25, r = 15, b = 5.5, l = 5.5)  
  )

Fig.22    


Fig.22.new <- hist.mix.gauss.4 + 
  labs(x = mensurando, y = "Absolute Frequency") +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = LI.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
             linetype = "solid", color = "#E57373", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = LS.IR.LabRI.Fig.5.1,
             linetype = "solid", color = "#4682B4", size = 0.6) +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = LI.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           xmax = LS.IC90.LI.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           ymin = 0, ymax = density.max.hist.mix.gauss.4,
           alpha = 0.2, fill = "#E53935") +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = LI.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           xmax = LS.IC90.LS.LabRI.Fig.5.1.new,
           ymin = 0, ymax = density.max.hist.mix.gauss.4,

     width = 6 * 600, height = 4 * 600,

#### 3.3.8.1. Plot CI via parametric using Monte Carlo simulation (Fig. 23) ####


tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".jpg")
jpeg(tmp, width = 4.4 * 600, height = 4.4 * 600, units = "px", 
     res = 300, quality = 100)

CI_RI_LabRI$plot("Fig. 23. Confidence intervals for LabRI method via parametric bootstrap using Monte Carlo simulation")

htmltools::img(src = knitr::image_uri(tmp), 
               style = "width:90%; display:block")


################################################################################
#### 3.3.9. Limits of CR #######################################################
################################################################################


LRL.Comparativo<-ifelse(is.numeric(
  as.numeric(Lower__Reference__Limit__of__Comparative_Reference))==TRUE,
  as.numeric(Lower__Reference__Limit__of__Comparative_Reference),
                     LRL.RI.LabRI)

LRL.Comparativo<-ifelse(is.na(LRL.Comparativo)==TRUE,LRL.RI.LabRI,LRL.Comparativo)

LRL.Comparativo<-round(LRL.Comparativo,digits = casa.decimal)


URL.Comparativo<-ifelse(is.numeric(
  as.numeric(Upper__Reference__Limit__of__Comparative_Reference))==TRUE,
  as.numeric(Upper__Reference__Limit__of__Comparative_Reference),
                     URL.RI.LabRI)

URL.Comparativo<-ifelse(is.na(URL.Comparativo)==TRUE,
                       URL.RI.LabRI,URL.Comparativo)

URL.Comparativo<-round(URL.Comparativo,digits = casa.decimal)


Interpretacao.Fonte.Refe.Comp<-Source_of_comparative_reference_used==""


Fonte.Refe.Comp<-ifelse(Interpretacao.Fonte.Refe.Comp==TRUE,
                        "Inform the source of the Comparative Reference.",
                        as.character(Source_of_comparative_reference_used))


################################################################################
#### 3.3.10. Comparative RI Histogram ##########################################
################################################################################


LRL.Comparativo.2<-ifelse(is.na(LRL.Comparativo)==TRUE,"---",LRL.Comparativo)
URL.Comparativo.2<-ifelse(is.na(URL.Comparativo)==TRUE,"---",URL.Comparativo)


main.histo.RC<-ifelse(is.na(LRL.Comparativo)==TRUE & is.na(URL.Comparativo)==TRUE,
                      paste("Fig. 24. Unreported Comparative Reference Interval."),
                      paste("Fig. 24. Comparative Reference Interval."))


Fig.24 <- hist.mix.gauss.4 + 
  
  labs(title = main.histo.RC, x = mensurando, y = "Absolute Frequency") +

           x = ifelse(is.na(LRL.Comparativo) == TRUE, URL.Comparativo, LRL.Comparativo),

                                                 URL.Comparativo, LRL.Comparativo), 
                                          scientific = FALSE)),
           vjust = -0.3, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#C376E0") +
  
  annotate("text", 
           x = ifelse(is.na(URL.Comparativo) == TRUE, LRL.Comparativo, URL.Comparativo), 
           y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("URL\n", format(ifelse(is.na(URL.Comparativo) == TRUE,
                                                 LRL.Comparativo, URL.Comparativo), 
                                          scientific = FALSE)),
           vjust = -0.3, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#C376E0") +
  
  annotate("text", 
           x = Midpoint_IR, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Midpoint\n", format(Midpoint_IR, scientific = FALSE)),
           vjust = -0.2, hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#404040") +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0,                     
      face  = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 35)        
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 25, r = 15, b = 5.5, l = 5.5)
  )

Fig.24


Fig.24.new<-hist.mix.gauss.4 + 
  labs(x=mensurando,y="Absolute Frequency") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=ifelse(is.na(LRL.Comparativo)==TRUE,
```
